hyperedges.label: Procedural FBM Shader Sky Weather Pattern

nodes.label: raw.githubusercontent.com Asset Linking
nodes.rationale: GitHub blob page URLs cannot load assets in HTML/Three.js/Markdown; must use raw.githubusercontent.com direct links.

nodes.label: FBM Procedural Clouds
nodes.rationale: Cloud UV is dir.xz/dir.y with time offset only on horizontal axes so clouds drift sideways and never sink underground.

nodes.label: FogExp2 Weather Atmosphere
nodes.rationale: FogExp2 is the core of weather haze; worse weather uses denser fog tinted toward cloud color.

nodes.label: Weather Presets sunny/sunset/overcast/rain/thunderstorm
nodes.rationale: Worse weather maps to greyer tones, higher coverage, lower brightness, and fog closer to cloud color.

nodes.norm_label: 11. real lighting time of day demo

nodes.label: updateSun Hour Unified Drive
nodes.rationale: Single updateSun(hour) drives sky, lights, fog, exposure, and clouds for coherent day-night.

nodes.label: OutlinePass BokehPass Bloom LUT Film Halftone
nodes.norm_label: outlinepass bokehpass bloom lut film halftone

nodes.label: AdditiveBlending Glow without Bloom
nodes.rationale: Uses AdditiveBlending for glow instead of UnrealBloomPass; additive stacking brightens emission without a bloom pass.

nodes.label: Real Lighting Scene Build Guide
nodes.source_file: docs/真实光照场景构建指南.md

nodes.label: ACES Tone Mapping plus IBL Stack
nodes.source_file: docs/真实光照场景构建指南.md
nodes.rationale: Real lighting needs SRGBColorSpace + ACESFilmicToneMapping, PMREM IBL, DirectionalLight shadows, HemisphereLight fill, and MeshStandardMaterial PBR.
nodes.norm_label: aces tone mapping plus ibl stack

nodes.label: 3.昼夜天气场景
nodes.rationale: 24h day-night cycle with Sky, rain/snow weather, UnrealBloomPass, random city

nodes.label: 4.动态天空
nodes.rationale: Custom shader gradient sky with FBM procedural drifting clouds and lil-gui

nodes.label: 5.晴阴雷电晚霞天空
nodes.rationale: Switchable weather presets: sunny/sunset/overcast/rain/thunderstorm with rain curtain and lightning

nodes.label: 6.灰尘雾气
nodes.rationale: Wind-driven dust/fog particles with turbulence; GUI for wind direction/force/density

nodes.label: 7.能量流动 · 电厂
nodes.rationale: Power-plant energy viz: water/heat/electric flow along pipes with Bloom and CSS2D labels

nodes.label: 8.风 · 风扇喷射
nodes.rationale: Procedural fan emitting conical mist particles; adjustable force/spread/amount/oscillation

nodes.label: 9.园区夜景 · Tech Park Night
nodes.rationale: Tech park night: building lights, street lamps, crowds, traffic, trees, fountain Water, Bloom

nodes.label: 10.真实GIS地形 · 合肥
nodes.rationale: Hefei real terrain: AWS Terrarium DEM tiles + Esri satellite imagery, contours, CSS2D labels

nodes.label: 11.真实光照 · Time of Day
nodes.rationale: Physical sky scattering + FBM clouds, 24h sun/fog/exposure, PMREM IBL, PBR materials

nodes.label: 12.激光特效
nodes.rationale: Laser lab: emitter hole jets trailing particles forming fluorescent bloom beams

nodes.label: 13.后期处理特效 · Post Processing
nodes.rationale: Full EffectComposer pipeline: outline/DOF/bloom/pixelate/LUT/film/chroma/vignette etc.

nodes.label: 14.激光粒子隧道
nodes.rationale: Tunnel laser: trailing particles + AdditiveBlending + shader scan beam centered in view

nodes.label: 15.熔岩焦土
nodes.rationale: Raymarching procedural lava river + FBM terrain + sparks; tunable ray steps for perf

nodes.label: 16.体积云天空 · three-clouds
nodes.rationale: @takram/three-clouds volumetric clouds + three-atmosphere scattering via jsDelivr CDN

nodes.label: 17.SSR降噪场景
nodes.rationale: WebGPU SSR + RecurrentDenoise + temporal reprojection + TRAA dungeon PBR scene

nodes.label: 18.材质特效集锦
nodes.rationale: Dual zones: 55 materials left, 55 energy-flow shaders (40 pipe FX) right, Bloom
